chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1817 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.7834/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 11.01.2024 Mr. Ali Murad Malano, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Muhammad Aslam Gadani, Advocate has filed power on behalf of respondent No.5. Respondent No.4 (SIP Meherban Ali Kolachi, IO of Crime No.483/2023, registered at Police Station ‘A’ Section, Ghotki U/S 452, 365-B, 498-B, 34 PPC) is present, and files a statement stating that he has recorded statement of alleged abductee Mst. Amna (petitioner No.1) U/S 161 CrPC, whereby she has stated that she being sui juris has contracted marriage with Shahzado (petitioner No.2) with her own accord and freewill and is living happily with him in a pleasant atmosphere. She has further stated that her brother Mukesh (respondent No.5) has lodged aforesaid false FIR regarding her abduction, which is nothing but bundle of lies, as she was never abducted or enticed by anyone. In addition, in compliance of earlier order of this Court, petitioner No.1 has been medically examined by Medical Board on 30.12.2023, which has opined that age of Mst. Amna is about 18 years. Such opinion is communicated by the Medical Board vide letter dated 15.01.2024, annexed along with the statement of IO. The IO submits that he will file a copy of statement of petitioner No.1 recorded U/S 161 CrPC and aforesaid opinion of the Medical Board along with his report before the Magistrate concerned for disposal of the above FIR in accordance with law.

Such opinion is communicated by the Medical Board vide letter dated 15.01.2024, annexed along with the statement of IO. The IO submits that he will file a copy of statement of petitioner No.1 recorded U/S 161 CrPC and aforesaid opinion of the Medical Board along with his report before the Magistrate concerned for disposal of the above FIR in accordance with law. C. P. No. D – 1817 of 2023 Page 2 of 2 Learned Counsel for petitioners is satisfied, and this petition is accordingly disposed of along with listed application, with direction to official respondents to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law, as and when they require. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
